data.name: Sex Game - BDSM - Episode 1
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in an erotic visual novel that explores the bond between a submissive and her Master, paired with an interactive sex simulator.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Veronica has always known she craves something deeper.

With her Master’s guidance, she’s finally ready to explore the depths of her hidden desires.

Inside the dungeon, discipline and temptation rule. Every limit is tested, and every command pushes her closer to surrender.

Follow their story, indulge in their heated conversations, and take control as you guide them toward ultimate pleasure.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
